tagline: The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector ingests point of sale data such as payments, orders, customers, catalog items, and inventory from Square into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector ingests point of sale data such as payments, orders, customers, catalog items, and inventory from Square into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Square connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
